results.rendered_html: añcala m. (perhaps also am) n. the border or end of a garment, especially of a woman's garment, of a veil, shawl. (in Bengālī, a strip of country, district.)

results.rendered_html: añcala m. Saum eines Kleides  H. 667  (nach den Sch. auch n.).  AK. 3,4,31 .  HALĀY. _im_ ŚKDR.  Sch. zu  ŚĀK. 14 . uttarīyāñcala  PAÑCAT. 236,9 . Zipfel eines Kleides: vastrāñcalāttasya jagrāha sarṣapān  VID. 113 . Ob statt locanāñjala = kaṭākṣa  ŚĀK. 23 , v. l. locanāñcala zu lesen sei, beibt ungewiss.
